question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not list the main chapters or sections of the thesis (e.g., Literature Review, Methodology, Implementation, Results). It only includes the problem statement and a development plan.

question: Description
feedback: The text does not describe the contents of any thesis sections. While it describes the problem and the timeline of activities, it lacks a summary of what each chapter of the thesis will entail.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis cannot be understood from this text. The text provides a project management timeline (plan) rather than the structural outline of the research work itself.
